_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: Hermes Agent
author: gelvey@neuronexus.xyz
description: Hermes AI Agent platform by Nous Research. Deploys the OpenAI-compatible gateway API and built-in web dashboard in a single container using s6-overlay. The terminal backend is locked to 'local' — no Docker-in-Docker commands are run.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# Hermes Agent Installation Script
# Runs in /mnt/server (maps to /home/container at runtime)
# No Docker commands are run inside the container — this is a Pelican-native deployment.

set -e

cd /mnt/server

# ── Generate a secure API key ──
API_KEY=$(cat /dev/urandom | tr -dc 'a-zA-Z0-9' | head -c 32)

# ── Create initial .env if it doesn't exist ──
if [ ! -f /mnt/server/.env ]; then
  cat > /mnt/server/.env <<EOF
# Hermes Environment Configuration
API_SERVER_ENABLED=true
API_SERVER_HOST=0.0.0.0
API_SERVER_KEY=${API_KEY}
# Terminal backend is configured in config.yaml (terminal.backend: local).
# Do NOT set terminal.backend to "docker" — there is no Docker daemon inside this container.
EOF
  echo "Created initial .env with a generated API key."
fi

# ── Create config.yaml with safe defaults ──
if [ ! -f /mnt/server/config.yaml ]; then
  cat > /mnt/server/config.yaml <<'YAMLEOF'
# Hermes Configuration
# Run 'hermes setup' via the console for interactive configuration.
#
# IMPORTANT: This is a Pelican Panel deployment.
# The terminal backend is set to "local" — commands run directly in the container.
# Do NOT change terminal.backend to "docker" — there is no Docker daemon inside this container.

terminal:
  backend: local
YAMLEOF
  echo "Created initial config.yaml with terminal.backend=local."
fi

echo "Installation complete."
echo "IMPORTANT: Configure your API keys and settings in the .env file."
echo "You can also run 'hermes setup' via the console for interactive setup."
echo "Terminal backend is locked to 'local' — no Docker-in-Docker is used."
exit 0

variables.name: Enable Dashboard
variables.description: Enable the built-in web dashboard (1 = enabled, 0 = disabled).

variables.name: Dashboard Port
variables.description: Port for the web dashboard. Must match the dashboard allocation you assign to the server.

variables.name: Dashboard Insecure Mode
variables.description: Disable the OAuth auth gate (1 = yes, 0 = no). Only use this on private/trusted networks.

variables.name: API Server Host
variables.description: Host address for the API server. 0.0.0.0 exposes it externally.

variables.name: Terminal Backend
variables.description: Informational: the authoritative setting is 'terminal.backend: local' in config.yaml (set by the install script). This variable is a visible reminder; the config.yaml is what Hermes actually reads. MUST remain 'local'.

variables.name: s6-overlay Read-Only Root
variables.description: Tell s6-overlay that the container root filesystem is read-only. Required for Pelican/Pterodactyl environments.

variables.name: Additional Environment Variables
variables.description: Extra environment variables to pass to Hermes (format: KEY=VALUE KEY2=VALUE2).
